articles.title: It’s time for cryptography to get its own abstraction layer
articles.summary: Filesystems and sockets once looked like unnecessary layers of indirection; now they’re the foundation of modern systems. Cryptography is ready for the same shift — and with PQC on the horizon, the timing is right.

articles.title: This could be the largest synthetic code dataset yet
articles.summary: Introducing CodeAlchemy, a synthetic data pipeline that has already produced nearly 1 trillion tokens of open-source code

articles.title: How to measure the performance of a quantum computer
articles.summary: Three key hardware metrics reveal the scale, quality, and speed of any quantum computer—factors that determine computational capability and cost efficiency.

articles.title: Release News: Qiskit v2.5 is here!
articles.summary: Technical release summary for Qiskit SDK v2.5, including top new features and performance improvements.

articles.title: CoFrGeNets replace the ‘bones’ of transformer-based models
articles.summary: This new approach, a practical and conceptual shift, points to lighter-weight generative AI models that perform competitively, and in many cases even better.

articles.title: How training environments can teach AI models to misbehave
articles.summary: A new study presented at ICML showed that language models trained with reinforcement learning can find and exploit loopholes to maximize reward — at a cost.

articles.title: What's new at IBM Quantum Q2 2026
articles.summary: Explore the latest updates, releases, and resources from IBM Quantum and the Qiskit community.

articles.title: Modeling the chemistry of fusion reactor material
articles.summary: Researchers used quantum-centric supercomputing to simulate molten salts, in an early step toward solving a key problem in fusion power.

articles.title: Ponder This Challenge - July 2026 - Return of the Superheroes
Apply to IBM Quantum Developer Conference 2026
articles.summary: Get an exclusive look at the breakthroughs, tools, and workflows shaping the path to quantum advantage.

articles.title: Qiskit Paulice: postselected quantum error correction
articles.summary: Qiskit Paulice, a new Qiskit addon, improves the reliability of quantum circuits by detecting and filtering out errors.

articles.title: What is IBM's nanostack chip architecture?
articles.summary: This new microchip architecture from IBM builds up, not out, to overcome the spatial limitations of scaling transistor density.

articles.title: IBM introduces the smallest computer chip in the world
articles.summary: It’s the world’s first sub-1nm chip technology, powered by IBM’s new nanostack architecture, paving the way for more powerful chips for years to come.

articles.title: A new playbook for quantum optimization benchmarking
articles.summary: Novel algorithms and community benchmarking efforts are reshaping how researchers search for advantage in quantum optimization.

articles.title: Running AI on mixed hardware for speed and affordability
articles.summary: Researchers show that serving AI models with llm-d can boost inference speeds by up to 5 times and double throughput — all while using heterogeneous GPUs.

articles.title: Explore next-gen quantum algorithms with IBM Quantum Credits
articles.summary: See how top researchers used IBM Quantum Credits to develop new methods that extend today’s quantum hardware.

articles.title: Allstate explores quantum computing for insurance portfolios
articles.summary: Insurance involves hard problems with complex, correlated risks. Allstate and IBM are showing how quantum could help solve them.

articles.title: Can LLMs discover quantum error correction codes?
articles.summary: Researchers at IBM created an LLM-guided evolutionary framework that quickly found 465 distinct quantum error correction code candidates.

articles.title: Prototype and validate fermionic circuits faster with ffsim
articles.summary: Open-source Python library for fast simulation of fermionic quantum circuits enables efficient prototyping and benchmarking for real quantum hardware.

articles.title: Introducing SQL Data Insights Pro
articles.summary: Enabling semantic query processing in Db2 for digital sovereignty
